reasoning: B better enables a correct answer because it contains a highly relevant primary Apple newsroom snippet that directly states the key WWDC26 Siri AI facts matching the query: Siri AI has personal context understanding, broad world knowledge, onscreen awareness, answers questions from the web on virtually any topic, surfaces information from messages/emails/photos, and shows conversation history in a new dedicated Siri app. It also includes the Apple Developer WWDC26 video snippet explicitly saying users can ask Siri AI anything and revisit conversations in a new dedicated app. Those are the core details asked about.
